title: The Nullified Perils
body:
# The Nullified Perils

**EMBRACE THE VOID.  
OBEY THE NULLIFIED.  
CORRUPTION IS ABUNDANT.**  


---

- Experience the golden days of _Minecraft Alpha_, whilst simultaneously facing the horrors of _The Broken Script_. Various anomalies and entities have taken over your world, and only want one thing: **To corrupt your world and make you suffer living in it.**

* Special Thanks to [wendigodrip](https://modrinth.com/user/wendigodrip) for making such an amazing mod, and another thanks goes to [RedstoneWizard08](https://modrinth.com/user/RedstoneWizard08) for making a safe 1.21.1 NeoForge port.

---

Additional Credits
* Special Thanks to the Nostalgic Tweaks Mod! Check it out on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nostalgic-tweaks) / [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks) -- really awesome mod!
* Corpse by henkelmax: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse)
* Trade Cycling by henkelmax: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trade-cycling](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trade-cycling)
